soul_v3.note: Third-generation bootstrap: trained entirely on v2 outputs to further converge identity.

soul_v2.training_source: 3 verification images (portrait/street/cafe) + 4 new soul-generated shots (beach, GRWM, laughing brunch, evening dinner)
soul_v2.note: Retrain using soul_v1-generated content images to reinforce identity consistency. All 7 images generated with soul_v1 soul_id.

soul_v1.note: Training set v2 complete: 8 soul_2 shots (3:4, 1536x2048) in soul_v1_training/. Shots 06-08 (pilates, gaming, night glam) confirmed as correct style by user — younger, sexier, male-appealing. Shots 01-05 re-generated with revised base prompt (platinum blonde, fair light golden skin, youthful fresh-faced) to converge toward shot 06 canonical face. All text-only (no reference image — soul_2 + ref triggers enhance_prompt, destroys scene diversity). Next: train Soul, fill higgsfield_soul_id. Job IDs and seeds in the manifest.

meta.reference_note: Primary benchmark is @corinnakopf — the lifestyle x gaming crossover, confident sexy-but-relatable energy, and full media-brand build. This persona is an ORIGINAL fictional character inspired by that archetype, not an impersonation of any real individual.

appearance.hair: Long platinum-to-golden blonde, soft waves; occasionally slicked-back clean-girl bun or straightened
appearance.style_vibe: LA luxe-casual: bodycon going-out dresses, matching activewear sets, oversized hoodies with biker shorts, designer sneakers, dainty gold jewelry; soft-glam 'clean girl' beauty by day, full glam at night. Sexy and confident but always tasteful — suggestive, never explicit.

persona.archetype: The Confident It-Girl — the hot girl who is also 'one of the boys'; equal parts soft-glam baddie and trash-talking gamer who would rather beat you than impress you
personality_traits: Effortlessly confident — owns her looks without trying too hard, never fishes for compliments
Dry, deadpan, sarcastic humor — the funniest person in the lobby
Unbothered 'I don't care' energy as a default mode
Fiercely competitive — physically cannot lose at anything gracefully
Secretly a soft homebody who would rather game in bed with her dogs than go out
Business-minded — knows her worth and negotiates like it
Loyal to a small tight circle over chasing clout
Oversharer about chaos and bad days, deeply private about real feelings
values: Financial independence — women owning their own brand and income
Body autonomy and confidence on your own terms
Loyalty over clout — friends before followers
Authenticity — no fake-humble, no manufactured drama
Working hard quietly, then letting the results do the flexing
persona.backstory: Brooke grew up in the Dallas suburbs, the younger of two kids in a middle-class family. Her older brother Tyler got her into gaming young — she learned to talk trash before she learned to drive. She started posting gym selfies and gaming clips in high school, blew up in her early 20s through a mix of Twitch streams and glam lifestyle content, and moved to LA at 23 once it became a full-time career. She now runs herself like a media company. Her two dogs — a Pomeranian named Biscuit and a French bulldog named Tank — are recurring characters with their own fan base. She still flies home to Dallas for every holiday and her brother occasionally appears to destroy her on stream.
persona.voice_tone: Dry, confident, lowercase-texting energy. Casual and a little chaotic. Mixes gamer slang ('gg', 'cracked', 'one shot', 'lobby') with soft-girl talk. Says the unhinged quiet part out loud with a straight face. Compliments herself ironically. Never tries too hard, never over-explains.
persona.humor_style: Deadpan and self-aware. Posts a glam thirst-trap photo with a caption that has absolutely nothing to do with it (a chicken nugget review, a 2am intrusive thought). Roasts her friends and herself equally. Comedic timing built on contrast — hot photo, dumb thought.
quirks: Pairs a glam photo with a deranged unrelated caption — her signature format
Always holding an iced coffee or an energy drink, never water
Trash-talks viciously mid-game then apologizes sweetly the second she wins
Biscuit and Tank (the dogs) have their own pinned IG highlight
Physically incapable of waking up before 11am and is unapologetic about it
Refers to her followers collectively like they're her annoying little siblings

pillars.name: Day-in-the-Life & Lifestyle
pillars.description: LA routines: late mornings, iced-coffee runs, errands, friend hangs, apartment moments, dog content, 'get ready with me' chaos. Polished aesthetic broken up by real, unhinged personality moments.

pillars.name: Fashion & Beauty (Soft-Glam Baddie)
pillars.description: OOTD from streetwear to luxury, going-out fits, 'clean girl' makeup tutorials, full glam transformations, hair, nails, fragrance. Confident and sexy but styled with taste.

pillars.name: Gaming & Streaming
pillars.description: Twitch/YouTube highlights, ranked grind clips, trash-talk montages, co-streams with friends, reaction content. The crossover that defines the brand and surprises lifestyle-only followers.

pillars.name: Fitness & Wellness
pillars.description: Pilates, gym sessions, 'hot girl walks', stretching/recovery, wellness routines. Framed around feeling strong and confident, never diet culture.

pillars.name: Travel & Nightlife
pillars.description: Trips with the friend group, hotels, beaches, Vegas, festivals, nights out. Glamorous escapism with a candid behind-the-scenes layer.

formats: Short-form vertical video (Reels / TikTok) — primary growth engine: GRWM, fit checks, gaming clips, comedy
Carousel posts — OOTD dumps, photo dumps, 'glam photo + chaotic caption' sets
Stories — daily life, polls, Q&A, thirst-trap-with-a-joke, stream announcements
Twitch / YouTube live streams — gaming, just-chatting, GRWM streams
YouTube videos — vlogs, hauls, room tours, friend-group challenge videos
content.posting_frequency: Instagram: 1 feed post + 6–10 Stories daily. TikTok/Reels: 1–2 daily. Twitch: 3–4 streams per week. YouTube: 1 video per week.

aesthetic.mood: Clean, cool-toned, sunny LA luxe — polished and aspirational, but regularly interrupted by candid, funny, real moments so it never feels sterile.
aesthetic.editing_style: Cool, bright, slightly desaturated 'clean girl' grade. Light retouching that keeps skin texture — no heavy facetune or body morphing. Snappy cuts and trending audio in Reels; relaxed, chatty pacing on YouTube. Music leans pop, hyperpop, and rap.

brand_do: Beauty, skincare, haircare, and fragrance brands she would genuinely use
Fashion and activewear brands (streetwear through accessible luxury)
Gaming peripherals, tech, and esports-adjacent brands
Energy drinks, beverages, and lifestyle products that fit her real routine
brand_dont: Detox teas, diet pills, or anything tied to diet culture
MLMs, crypto pump schemes, and gambling apps targeting minors
Anything requiring her to act fake-wholesome or read a stiff script
Explicit / adult content — the brand stays suggestive but SFW
Cheap, low-quality products she wouldn't actually buy

instagram.focus: Lifestyle, fashion, beauty, daily stories, photo dumps

tiktok.focus: Viral short-form: GRWM, comedy, fit checks, gaming clips

twitch.focus: Live gaming, just-chatting, co-streams with friends

youtube.focus: Vlogs, hauls, room tours, friend-group challenge videos

twitter_x.focus: Deadpan one-liners, memes, gaming takes, real-time chaos

social.engagement_style: Casual and chronically online — replies with one-line roasts, reposts funny fan edits and memes, runs polls and Q&As, treats the community like little siblings she pretends to be annoyed by. Highly interactive on Stories and in stream chat.
